name: PLA
description: Most common 3D printing material. Biodegradable, easy to print.

name: PETG
description: Stronger than PLA with good chemical resistance.

name: ABS
description: Durable and heat-resistant. Requires enclosed printer.

name: Nylon
description: Very strong, flexible, and wear-resistant.

name: TPU
description: Flexible, rubber-like material for gaskets and grips.

name: ASA
description: UV-resistant alternative to ABS for outdoor use.

name: PC
description: Extremely tough and heat-resistant engineering plastic.

name: HIPS
description: Dissolvable support material for ABS prints.

name: Wood PLA
description: PLA with wood fibers for a natural wood appearance.

name: Carbon Fiber
description: Extremely stiff and strong composite filament.

name: Metal Fill
description: PLA with metal powder for metallic finish and weight.

name: Standard Resin
description: General-purpose resin with high detail and smooth finish.

name: Tough Resin
description: Impact-resistant resin mimicking ABS properties.

name: Flexible Resin
description: Rubber-like flexible resin for soft-touch parts.

name: Castable Resin
description: Burns out cleanly for investment casting of jewelry/metal.

name: Dental Resin
description: FDA-cleared resin for dental models and surgical guides.

name: Nylon SLS
description: Standard SLS powder for durable functional parts.

name: Aluminum
description: Lightweight, excellent machinability. Most common CNC metal.

name: Mild Steel
description: Strong, weldable, affordable. Standard structural metal.

name: Stainless Steel
description: Corrosion-resistant steel for food/medical applications.

name: Titanium
description: Lightweight, extremely strong. Aerospace and medical grade.

name: Brass
description: Easy to machine, good for decorative and electrical parts.

name: Copper
description: Excellent thermal and electrical conductivity.

name: Bronze
description: Wear-resistant bearing material with low friction.

name: Wood
description: Natural material for CNC routing and laser cutting.

name: Acrylic
description: Clear or colored plastic. Great for laser cutting.

name: Delrin
description: Low-friction engineering plastic for gears and bearings.

name: HDPE
description: Chemical-resistant, food-safe plastic.

name: MDF
description: Smooth, uniform engineered wood for CNC and laser.

name: Plywood
description: Layered wood sheet, popular for laser cutting projects.

name: Polycarbonate Sheet
description: Impact-resistant clear plastic sheet material.

name: Leather
description: Natural or synthetic leather for laser engraving/cutting.

name: Glass
description: For laser engraving. Cannot be laser cut.

name: Fabric
description: Various fabrics for laser cutting patterns.

name: Paper
description: Paper and cardstock for laser or vinyl cutting.

name: Cardboard
description: Cardboard for prototyping and packaging.

name: Vinyl
description: Adhesive vinyl for decals, signs, and transfers.

name: Foam
description: Foam sheets for CNC routing and laser cutting.
